title: Builder result signal
description: Returned by every builder agent (frontend-builder, cms-builder, auth-builder, deployer, content-writer, …) at the end of a task. Strict JSON, no free text — see ADR-0007.

status.description: complete = task fully done, all tests pass. partial = some artifacts created but task not finished (typically budget exhaustion). failed = no usable output.

artifacts_created.description: Paths (relative to project root) of files the builder created or rewrote.

artifacts_modified.description: Paths of files the builder edited but did not create.

tests_passed.description: Whether all relevant local tests/checks (build, type-check, lint, scoped tests) passed at the moment the agent returned.

summary.description: One-sentence summary of what was done. Surfaced in dashboard event feed.

next_suggested_action.description: Hint to the orchestrator. The orchestrator may ignore it if its own logic disagrees.

logs_excerpt.description: Short tail of relevant log output that helps healer/operator diagnose.
